questions.explanation: Winds are caused by uneven heating of Earth's surface. Air moves from high pressure to low pressure areas.
When air is heated, it expands and becomes lighter. This causes it to rise, creating low pressure.

questions.correctAnswer: A violent storm with very strong winds revolving around a low pressure center.
questions.explanation: Cyclones are characterized by very low pressure center, strong winds, and heavy rain.

questions.text: The calm center of a cyclone is called the ________.
questions.explanation: The eye of a cyclone is the calm center with clear skies and light winds, surrounded by the eyewall.
